name: Big Game Hunter
description: Elite enemies swarm the Spire and drop better rewards.

name: Cursed Run
description: At the start of each Act, add a random [red]Curse[/red] to your deck.

name: Deadly Events
description: Unknown rooms can now contain Elites, but are also more likely to contain Treasure rooms.

name: Draft
description: Choose [blue]10[/blue] [gold]card rewards[/gold] to replace your starting deck.

name: Flight
description: You may ignore paths when choosing the next room to travel to.

name: Hoarder
description: Whenever you add a card to your deck, add [blue]2[/blue] additional copies. You can no longer remove cards from your deck at the Merchant.

name: Insanity
description: Start with a random deck of [blue]30[/blue] cards.

name: Midas
description: Enemies drop [blue]200%[/blue] more gold, but you can no longer Smith at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold].

name: Murderous
description: You start each combat with [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. All enemies start combat with [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

name: Night Terrors
description: Resting at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold] heals all of your HP, but costs [red]5[/red] Max HP.

name: Sealed Deck
description: Choose [blue]10[/blue] out of [blue]30[/blue] cards to replace your starting deck.

name: Specialized
description: Start with [blue]5[/blue] copies of a single card.

name: Terminal
description: Whenever you enter a new room, lose [red]1[/red] Max HP. Start each combat with [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].

name: Vintage
description: Normal enemies drop relics instead of cards.
